verses.sanskrit: इत्युक्त्वा मैथिलीं राजा रावणः शत्रुरावणः ।सन्दिश्य च ततः सर्वा राक्षसीर्निर्जगाम ह ।। ५.२१.१।।।।
verses.text:
Seetha listening to that horrible ogre's word, being tormented spoke in reply with a pitiable voice, 
pitifully and slowly.

verses.sanskrit: निष्क्रान्ते राक्षसेन्द्रे तु पुनरन्तःपुरं गते ।राक्षस्यो भीमरूपास्ताः सीतां समभिदुद्रुवुः ।। ५.२१.२।।।।
verses.text:
Being tormented by grief, in a pitiful state, with excellent limbs, devoted to husband, thinking 
about husband alone, with pleasant smiles Seetha was sobbing, shivering and placing a straw in between herself 
and Ravana spoke thus in reply.

verses.sanskrit: ततः सीतामुपागम्य राक्षस्यः क्रोधमूर्छिताः ।परं परुषया वाचा वैदेहीम् इदमब्रुवन् ।। ५.२१.३।।।।
verses.text:
"Turn your mind back from me. Let your mind be made on your own wives. Like best emancipation for 
a sinner, it is not appropriate to pray me."

verses.sanskrit: पौलस्त्यस्य वरिष्ठस्य रावणस्य महात्मनः ।दशग्रीवस्य भार्यात्वं सीते न बहु मन्यसे ।। ५.२१.४।।।।
verses.text:
"I was born in a great family. Getting such family, having one husband, a bad deed which is blameable 
is not to be made by me."

verses.sanskrit: ततस्त्वेकजटा नाम राक्षसी वाक्यमब्रवीत् ।आमन्त्र्य क्रोधताम्राक्षी सीतां करतलोदरीम् ।। ५.२१.५।।।।
verses.text: Seetha with renown thus speaking to that Ravana, turned back and spoke words again.

verses.sanskrit: प्रजापतीनां षण्णां तु चतुर्थो यः प्रजापतिः ।मानसो ब्रह्मणः पुत्रः पुलस्त्य इति विश्रुतः ।। ५.२१.६।।।।
verses.text:
"I who am wife of another and devoted to husband am not suitable wife to you. Observe righteousness 
well. Follow well course of conduct of virtuous."

verses.sanskrit: पुलस्त्यस्य तु तेजस्वी महर्षिर्मानसः सुतः ।नाम्ना स विश्रवा नाम प्रजापतिसमप्रभः ।। ५.२१.७।।।।
verses.text:
"O Ogre! How your wives are to be protected, in the same way others' wives are to be protected. 
Making yourself as an example enjoy your own wives."

verses.sanskrit: तस्य पुत्रो विशालाक्षि रावणः शत्रुरावणः ।तस्य त्वं राक्षसेन्द्रस्य भार्या भवितुमर्हसि ।मयोक्तं चारुसर्वाङ्गि वाक्यं किं नानुमन्यसे ।। ५.२१.८।।।।
verses.text:
"One who is not satisfied in own wives, a fickle-minded one with disturbed senses, mean minded 
one, to such a man, others' wives will lead to humilation."

verses.sanskrit: ततो हरिजटा नाम राक्षसी वाक्यमब्रवीत् ।विवृत्य नयने कोपान्मार्जारसदृशेक्षणा ।। ५.२१.९।।।।
verses.text:
"Here are there not good people? Or are you not following those who are good? It must be like that 
because your mind, devoid of traditions is perverse."

verses.sanskrit: येन देवास्त्रयस्त्रिंशद्देवराजश्च निर्जितः ।तस्य त्वं राक्षसेन्द्रस्य भार्या भवितुमर्हसि ।। ५.२१.१०।।।।
verses.text:
"You who is being led by mind towards unreal is not taking wholesome words being said by righteous 
onesfor the destruction of ogres."

verses.sanskrit: वीर्योत्सिक्तस्य शूरस्य सङ्ग्रामेष्वनिवर्तिनः ।बलिनो वीर्ययुक्तस्या भार्यात्वं किं न लप्स्यसे ।। ५.२१.११।।।।
verses.text:
"After getting a king who has uncontrolled mind, interested in a bad path, wealthy states and cities 
also will be destroyed. After getting you like that this Lanka filled with best things in a short while will be 
destroyed due to your one sin."

verses.sanskrit: प्रियां बहुमतां भार्यां त्यक्त्वा राजा महाबलः ।सर्वासां च महाभागां त्वामुपैष्यति रावणः ।। ५.२१.१२।।।।
समृद्धं स्त्रीसहस्रेण नानारत्नोपशोभितम् ।अन्तःपुरं समुत्सृज्य त्वामुपैष्यति रावणः ।। ५.२१.१३।।।।
verses.text:
"O Ravana! When there is destruction of a short sighted one being hit by his own deeds, a sinner, 
living beings will be happy."

verses.sanskrit: असकृद्देवता युद्धे नागगन्धर्वदानवाः ।निर्जिताः समरे येन स ते पार्श्वमुपागतः ।। ५.२१.१४।।।।
verses.text:
"About you who is a sinner thus being destroyed, people who have been humiliated by you being happy 
will speak thus: 'The cruel Ravana by God's grace has got this danger' ".

verses.sanskrit: तस्य सर्वसमृद्धस्या रावणस्य महात्मनः ।किमर्थं राक्षसेन्द्रस्य भार्यात्वं नेच्छसेऽधमे ।। ५.२१.१५।।।।
verses.text:
"I am not capable to be tempted by wealth or by money. I am not separate with Raghava like the 
sun-shine with the sun."

verses.sanskrit: यस्य सूर्यो न तपति भीतो यस्य च मारुतः ।न वाति स्मायतापाङ्गे किं त्वं तस्य न तिष्ठसि ।। ५.२१.१६।।।।
verses.text:
"After making as a pillow that worshipped shoulder of that lord of the world, of that Rama, how 
can I make as pillow some other one's shoulder?"

verses.sanskrit: पुष्पवृष्टिं च तरवो मुमुचुर्यस्य वै भयात् ।शैलाश्च सुभ्रु पानीयं जलदाश् च यदेच्छति ।। ५.२१.१७।।।।
verses.text:
"Like the education of a brahmin with a famous mind, initiated in religious vow, I am suitable 
wife to that Rama alone the lord of earth."

verses.sanskrit: तस्य नैरृतराजस्य राजराजस्य भामिनि ।किं त्वं न कुरुषे बुद्धिं भार्यार्थे रावणस्य हि ।। ५.२१.१८।।।।
verses.text: "O Ravana! Let me meet together with Rama like a female elephant with a male elephant in a forest."

verses.sanskrit: साधु ते तत्त्वतो देवि कथितं साधु भामिनि ।गृहाण सुस्मिते वाक्यमन्यथा न भविष्यसि ।। ५.२१.१९।।
verses.text:
"It is suited that this Rama, best among men, is made to be a friend by you who is desiring continued 
existence and not desiring a horrible slaying."
